chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-1923 of 2017 (Israr Ahmed & others Vs. Government of Pakistan & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. 18-01-2024. Mr. Mushtaque Ahmed Shahani, advocate for the petitioners. None present for the respondents. ******** The petitioners, who are third party employees working with OGDCL at Qadirpur Gas field by way of instant petition have sought for direction against the respondents to regularize their services. The petitioners being daily wages/casual/work charge employees have got no vested right to seek direction against the respondents for regularization of their services in derogation of terms of their daily wages/casual work charge employment that too through third party. Such direction, if is issued then it would amount to denial of right of contest to aspiring candidates for their regular appointment with the respondents on merits. Such right is guaranteed by Article 25 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. Consequently, the instant Constitution Petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly directing the petitioners to apply for their appointment with the respondents on regular basis whenever such posts are advertised by them formally, if so is advised to them. Judge Judge 2 Nasim/P.A
